metadata.description: Spoke VNet name (must exist in current RG).
Subnet name to update with the route table attachment.
Route table resource ID to attach. Empty string = no-op (module is gated upstream anyway).

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName'))]
resources.properties: [union(createObject('addressPrefix', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[1]), '2024-05-01').addressPrefix, 'networkSecurityGroup', if(empty(coalesce(tryGet(reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[1]), '2024-05-01'), 'networkSecurityGroup'), createObject())), null(), createObject('id', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[1]), '2024-05-01').networkSecurityGroup.id)), 'delegations', coalesce(tryGet(reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[1]), '2024-05-01'), 'delegations'), createArray()), 'privateEndpointNetworkPolicies', coalesce(tryGet(reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[1]), '2024-05-01'), 'privateEndpointNetworkPolicies'), 'Enabled')), if(empty(parameters('routeTableId')), createObject(), createObject('routeTable', createObject('id', parameters('routeTableId')))))]

subnetId.value: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[1])]
